action.reasoning: Observation: Previous full-precision LoRA OOM'd; QLoRA reduces memory ~4x. In iter 21, bitsandbytes not installed caused import error. Analysis: Installing bitsandbytes and using QLoRA will enable training on full 7100-sample dataset within GPU memory. With effective batch size 8, 2 epochs are feasible in ~1-2 hours. After training, merge LoRA into full-precision model for eval. This should improve spatial accuracy (previous 500-sample model had near-zero IoU). Decision: Write complete QLoRA training script with val monitoring, merge, and save merged model. Then submit eval.
